summary: Tested only requested new changes for landing page and /api/inquiries; all requested flows pass on public URL.

minor.issue: Legacy payload fields business_phone/additional_numbers now return 422; existing old test suite shows contract drift.

action_items: Update or replace outdated backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_inquiries_api.py to new business_numbers contract.
Optionally decide whether backward compatibility for legacy inquiry payload should be supported.
critical_code_review_comments: API model and frontend are aligned on business_numbers + package limits and enforce correctly.
Old regression tests still target removed fields and now fail, which can hide real regressions unless updated.
test_credentials: No auth flow tested. /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but has no credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created inquiry records via API during tests (unique emails).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Requested features validated on production preview URL via pytest + Playwright. One old backend test file is stale and fails against current API contract.
rca of the issue: RCA for failing legacy tests: endpoint schema changed from business_phone/additional_numbers to business_numbers array. Pydantic validation fails at request parsing (422) before accept_guarantee_terms business rule check (400), so old expectations no longer match implementation.
